Subject: Sun Devil Project - Fuel Study
Message:
Attached is an Excel spreadsheet comparing fuel used between Red Rock and propose Sun Devil projects.  The Phoenix delivery of 500 MMcf/d is locked and the Cal. border deliveries decrease in 10% increments down to 60%.  If you look at the mainline fuel use only, there is a decrease in fuel used per flowing volume.  If you have any questions, please call.

 

Ron Matthews
